title: 宝塚記念の後に・父から子へ

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
And it's Tamamo Cross! Tamamo Cross is the
winner!

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
That was truly a performance befitting the
number one fan favorite! She's strong! She's
popular! What more could you ask for?!

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: YEEEEES! How do ya like dem apples!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Wooooo!

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: As long as ya got the drive, there's nothin' ya can't do! No rock bottom ya can't climb outta!

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: Didja see dat, Dad?! I got da win!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Wooooo!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
By now, every one of Tamamo Cross's fans knows
about her upbringing. Their cheers rumble
throughout the racecourse, becoming the thunder
that follows the lightning.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
(They should be okay now. Dad... the whole
family.)

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: (...Didja see me run, Oguri? That was White Lightning.)

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
(I run for my family back home. What do you run
for? What're you aimin' for?)

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: Tama...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Oguri Cap's eyes are glued to Tamamo Cross...
and she's not the only one.

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
When the hell did this turn into a tearjerker?! It's
like someone's cuttin' onions in here...

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
Hey, Tama! You better take damn good care of
your family while you can! 'Cause next year's
gonna be different!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Inari One leaves, sniffling and mumbling away as
she goes.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: Trainer! I followed your words to the tee.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
I can win... I can keep racing! Man, I'm so glad I
didn't quit!

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: Damn right. 'Cause the real deal's finally in reach.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: The one, the only! The Senior G1! I can't say I'm at the top till I've seized victory there!

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: You know where I'm talkin' about, right?

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
Then on the count of three, we say it! One, two...
Three!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
We shout out the name of the race. No other fall
race has the same prestige as that one.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
If Tamamo Cross can win the autumn Tenno Sho,
I'm sure her father will be delighted as well. We
settle on the destination for our next run in an
instant.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: One evening a few days later...

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: Are ya serious, Dad?! You're outta the hospital?!

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross's Father
text_block_list.text:
Yeah, no joke. Haha, after seein' that run of
yours, no way I could stay all cooped up!

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross's Father
text_block_list.text: You reminded me of my own brand of lightnin'.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: Your lightnin'?

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: Oh, right! Your nickname at work!

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross's Father
text_block_list.text:
That's right. They call me "Lightning" on the job
'cause I work so fast. Yup, when it comes to
efficiency, there's nobody else on your dad's
level.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross's Father
text_block_list.text:
Those legs of yours may be from your mom, but
personally, I think ya got that lightnin' of yours
from me.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
Yeah... I think so too, Dad. If you're the original
Lightning, and I'm...

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: The second generation.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
Um, Dad? Actually, there's someone I wanna
strike with my lightnin'.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
So keep yer eyes peeled! 'Cause White
Lightning's 'bout to come down hard!

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross's Father
text_block_list.text:
All right, I'll look forward to seein' that. See ya
later, Tama. Don't go catchin' any colds now.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
Look out, autumn Tenno Sho, 'cause here I come.
And guess what?

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
I don't gotta worry 'bout my family no more! The
other racers better be ready, 'cause nothin'
holdin' me back now!
